com.pax.poslink

Class ReportRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseRequest<ReportRequest>
      • com.pax.poslink.ReportRequest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable

    public class ReportRequest
extends BaseRequest<ReportRequest>
    To set report transaction request properties
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Field Detail

      • TransType

        public int TransType
        Indicate the transaction type.

        LOCALTOTALREPORT =1 - used to retrieve the total count and total amount from the terminal via EDC type or card type.
        LOCALDETAILREPORT = 2 - used to retrieve the transaction detail from the terminal.
        LOCALFAILEDREPORT = 3 - Whenever a Settlement is run, there is the possibility that some of the transactions will fail during settlement. Those transactions are saved and their details can be retrieved using this message so that the merchant can directly settle the outstanding transactions with the card processor. If the record has reported, it will not reported again.
        HOSTREPORT = 4 - The ECR/PC should print the return line message "R07". This command is to get the current batch information of host..
        HISTORYREPORT = 5 - get the last batch information.
        SAFSUMMARYREPORT = 6 - This command is to summary report of store and forward (SAF) information.
        HOSTDETAILREPORT = 7 - This command is used to retrieve the transaction information from the host. An Error will be returned while invoking POSLink.ProcessTrans if user set other value.
        User can assign the TransType by com.PAX.POSLink.ReportRequest.ParseTransType or assign an integer directly.
        Example:
        ReportRequest report = new ReportRequest();
        report.TransType = report.ParseTransType("LOCALTOTALREPORT"); //recommend
        or
        report.TransType = 1;

      • EDCType

        public int EDCType
        Indicate the EDC type.

        ALL = 0
        CREDIT = 1
        DEBIT = 2
        CHECK = 3
        EBT = 4
        GIFT = 5
        LOYALTY = 6
        CASH = 7
        Only above value accepted, other value will be omitted.
        F EBT includes EBT_FOODSTAMP and EBT_CASHBENEFIT.
        User can assign the EDCType by ParseEDCType(java.lang.String) or assign an integer directly.
        Example: ReportRequest report = new ReportRequest();
        report.EDCType = report.ParseEDCType("CREDIT"); //recommend
        or
        report.EDCType = 1;

      • CardType

        public int CardType
        Indicate the Card type.

        Attribute: n2

        VISA = 1
        MASTERCARD = 2
        AMEX = 3
        DISCOVER = 4
        DINERCLUB = 5
        ENROUTE = 6
        JCB = 7
        REVOLUTIONCARD = 8
        OTHER = 9
        Only above value accepted, other value will be omitted.
        Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT/ LOCALTOTALREPORT
        User can assign the CardType by ParseCardType(String) or assign an integer directly.
        Example: ReportRequest report = new ReportRequest();
        report.CardType = report.ParseCardType("MASTERCARD"); //recommend
        or
        report.CardType = 2;

      • PaymentType

        public int PaymentType
        Indicate the payment type.

        Attribute: n2

        See PaymentTransType for definition. User can assign the PaymentType by ParsePaymentType(String) or assign an integer directly.
        Example:
        ReportRequest report = new ReportRequest();
        report.PaymentType = report.ParseTransType("ADJUST"); //recommend
        or
        report.PaymentType = 10;

      • RecordNum

        public java.lang.String RecordNum
        The log index in terminal.

        Attribute: n…4

        Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

      • RefNum

        public java.lang.String RefNum
        Terminal reference number used for follow-up transactions.

        Attribute: n…4

        Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

      • AuthCode

        public java.lang.String AuthCode
        Retrieve the transaction record with the matching authorization number.

        Attribute: ans…10

        Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT/HOSTDETAILREPORT

      • ECRRefNum

        public java.lang.String ECRRefNum
        Retrieve the transaction record with the merchant reference number.

        Attribute: ans…16

        Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

      • SAFIndicator

        public java.lang.String SAFIndicator
        Store and forward transaction report indicator.

        Attribute: n1

        0: New record report 1: Failed record report 2: All (New + Failed report)

        Used only TransType is SAFSUMMARYREPORT

      • ExtData

        public java.lang.String ExtData
        Extended data in XML format

        Example:<TagName>x</TagName>

        Note: refer to XML restriction, the below characters need to escape at first to avoid exception. ‘, “, <, >, &. Should escape as these &quot;, &apos;, &lt;, &gt;, &amp;.

        See ReportRequest ExtData for definition.

      • LastTransaction

        public java.lang.String LastTransaction
        Retrieve the last transaction details

        Valid value:

        0 = needn't(default value) 1 = need

        Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

      • MultiMerchant

        public MultiMerchant MultiMerchant
        MultiMerchant Information. see MultiMerchant for detail.

        Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

        Since:
        V1.04.00

      • ECRTransID

        public java.lang.String ECRTransID
        ECR transaction ID, unique code in ECR side.

        Attribute: ans…64

        Used only TransType is HOSTDETAILREPORT

        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • HRefNum

        public java.lang.String HRefNum
        Host reference number (Transaction UID). This field is host dependent; it can be used to run Void/Return transactions.

        Attribute: ans…32

        Used only TransType is HOSTDETAILREPORT

        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • TransactionResultType

        public java.lang.String TransactionResultType
        Filter included transaction by Transaction Result.

        Attribute: n1

        0 – Successful transactions only(Default)
        1 – Failed transactions only
        2 – All transactions

        Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

        Since:
        V1.13.00

    • Constructor Detail

      • ReportRequest

        public ReportRequest()

    • Method Detail

      • ParseEDCType

        public int ParseEDCType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String EDC type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - could be "ALL","CREDIT","DEBIT","CHECK","EBT","GIFT","LOYALTY","CASH"
        Returns:
        an integer identify the EDC Type, or -1 if parse error.

      • ParseCardType

        public int ParseCardType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String Card type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - could be "VISA","MASTERCARD","AMEX","DISCOVER","DINERCLUB","ENROUTE","JCB","REVOLUTIONCARD","OTHER"
        Returns:
        an integer identify the Card Type, or -1 if parse error.

      • ParsePaymentType

        public int ParsePaymentType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String transaction type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - Same as PaymentRequest.ParseTransType(String)
        Returns:
        an integer identify the transaction Type, or -1 if parse error.

      • ParseTransType

        public int ParseTransType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String transaction type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - could be "LOCALTOTALREPORT ","LOCALDETAILREPORT","LOCALFAILEDREPORT","HOSTREPORT","HISTORYREPORT", "SAFSUMMARYREPORT", "HOSTDETAILREPORT
        Returns:
        an integer identify the TransType, or -1 if parse error.

      • pack

        protected ReportRequest pack()
        Specified by:
        pack in class BaseRequest<ReportRequest>
